pi_items.source: Task description and verifier.py logic explicitly checking these titles.
Task description prompt text mentions 'bare-metal cloud provider'.
export_result.sh explicitly outputs to this file and verifier.py explicitly loads it from RESULT_PATH.

privileged_info_summary: The task requires generating a Graphite dashboard named 'Hypervisor Telemetry' with three graphs: 'System Memory Layout' (using stacked memory metrics), 'CPU Core Comparison' (using aliasByNode with index 3 for CPU cores), and 'System Load Envelopes' (using lineWidth 2 for load metrics). The data is real-time system metrics collected by collectd. All dashboard parameters, output paths, and domain information explicitly match the prompt instructions and verifier evaluation constraints.
